info.name: ONHS UC1 — Single Patient Engagement
info.description:
## ONHS UC1 — Single Patient Engagement

**Scenario:** Meena (ASHA FLW) facilitates a Swaasa AI cough analysis for Ramesh (patient)
using the ONHS network. Two payment paths: entitlement drawdown against the NGO HealthEntitlement
issued in UC0, or on-the-spot UPI payment.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 + Health* schema pack v2.1
**Service:** Swaasa AI Cough Analysis (DIAGNOSTIC_ANALYTICS) | **Quantity:** 1 unit per engagement

### Quick-start: environment setup

1. Import **ONHS_UC1_Dev_Environment.json** into Postman (Environments → Import).
2. Select the **ONHS Dev** environment from the environment picker.
3. Set `bpp_uri`, `bap_uri`, and `auth_token` to your sandbox endpoints.
4. `network_id` is currently `onhs.in/health` (placeholder) — confirm with the network registry team.
5. UUID variable defaults are pre-filled; regenerate for separate test runs if needed.
6. For Scenario A: set `entitlement_id` to the value returned by UC0 `on_confirm`.

### Scenarios

**Scenario A — Entitlement Drawdown (8 steps: select → on_status)**
Swastha Karnataka Foundation (NGO implementing agency) draws down one unit against the
HealthEntitlement issued in UC0. No cash payment — entitlementRef in consideration
signals the drawdown. Starts at `select` (no discover — seeker app knows provider and
service from the entitlement record).

**Scenario B — On-the-spot UPI Payment (10 steps: discover → on_status)**
Individual patient (INDIVIDUAL payerArchetype) pays Rs.250 via UPI at point of care.
Full lifecycle from discover. UPI VPA communicated out-of-band by BPP after `on_init`.
Note: `paymentInstructions` is not a valid `Contract` field (additionalProperties: false
in beckn.yaml) — UPI VPA is communicated out-of-band.

**Scenario D — Entitlement Exhausted / Failure (2 steps)**
select attempt against an exhausted entitlement; BPP returns CANCELLED contract at on_select.

### Bifurcation rule

An engagement carries exactly one of `{entitlementRef, paymentAuthorisation}` — never both.
- Scenario A: consideration carries `entitlementRef` → no `paymentAuthorisation`
- Scenario B: consideration carries `paymentAuthorisation` → no `entitlementRef`

### Structural conventions (per core beckn.yaml v2.0.0)

- `select` carries a DRAFT `Contract` object (`SelectAction.contract` per core spec);
  BAP originates the contract without `id`; BPP assigns `contract.id` at `on_select`
- `schemaContext` only on `discover` and `on_discover` (catalog phase); absent from all
  negotiation messages (select → on_status)
- `OFFER_REF` always includes `resourceIds: ["{{resource_id}}"]` (required per spec)
- `status` uses `message.contract {id, commitments[]}` — not a flat `contractId`
- `billingDetails`, `paymentInstructions`, `invoiceDetails` are **banned** from `Contract`
  (`additionalProperties: false`); billing name lives in `participants[].descriptor.name`
- Participant PII (name, ABHA, dateOfBirth) absent at `select` — added from `init` onward
- HealthContract.consent required for DIAGNOSTIC_ANALYTICS (FLW-mediated)
- `artifactAccessEndpoint` in `contractAttributes` at `on_select` — BAP uploads cough
  audio off-network before `confirm`
- Entitlement drawdown: `on_init` acknowledgement communicated out-of-band (no
  `paymentInstructions` in contract — this field does not exist in Contract schema)

### Consideration lifecycle

| Call       | Scenario A (entitlement) | Scenario B (UPI)   |
|------------|--------------------------|---------------------|
| select     | *(none — intent only)*   | *(none)*            |
| on_select  | PENDING (Rs.200)         | PENDING (Rs.250)    |
| init       | PENDING (echo)           | PENDING (echo)      |
| on_init    | QUOTED (Rs.200)          | QUOTED (Rs.250)     |
| confirm    | ACTIVE (drawdown)        | ACTIVE (UPI auth)   |
| on_confirm | ACTIVE                   | ACTIVE              |
| on_status  | ACTIVE                   | ACTIVE              |

### Key outputs

- `contract_id_a` / `contract_id_b` — assigned by BPP at `on_select`
- HealthPerformance with `clinicalInterpretation` (confidence, flaggedFindings) at `on_status`
- `entitlement_id` — consumed from UC0 `on_confirm` (feed UC0's entitlement_id into
  this collection's `entitlement_id` variable before running Scenario A)

variable.description: Provider NP (BPP) — target for discover, select, init, confirm, status
Seeker NP (BAP) — target for on_* callback simulations
Confirm exact value with network registry team before going live
UUID format required by core spec. Scenario A transaction.
UUID format required. BPP assigns at on_select. Scenario A.
UUID format required by core spec. Scenario B transaction.
UUID format required. BPP assigns at on_select. Scenario B.
Single-engagement offer selected in Scenario B
Implementing agency (NGO). Used in Scenario A.
UPI transaction reference. Used in Scenario B confirm.
Issued at UC0 on_confirm. Set to the value from the UC0 collection before running Scenario A.
Reference for uploaded cough audio sample
Reference for generated AI analysis report

item.name: Scenario A — Entitlement Drawdown
item.description: NGO implementing agency (Swastha Karnataka Foundation) draws down 1 unit of Swaasa cough analysis against the HealthEntitlement issued in UC0. Starts at select (no discover — seeker app resolves provider from entitlement). 8 steps: select → on_status.

item.name: 01 — select
item.description: BAP originates DRAFT contract. Minimal participants (no PII). Consideration intent: payerArchetype=NGO + entitlementRef (no price yet).

item.name: 02 — on_select
item.description: BPP assigns contract.id. Consideration: PENDING (Rs.200). artifactAccessEndpoint returned for off-network audio upload.

item.name: 03 — init
item.description: BAP submits full participant details (PATIENT, FIELD_WORKER, IMPLEMENTING_AGENCY). Billing name in IMPLEMENTING_AGENCY.descriptor.name (billingDetails is not a valid Contract field). Consent captured. Consideration: PENDING (binding intent echoed).

item.name: 04 — on_init
item.description: BPP issues binding quote (QUOTED). Drawdown confirmation communicated out-of-band. Note: paymentInstructions is not a valid Contract field (additionalProperties: false) — entitlement drawdown has no cash payment.

item.name: 05 — confirm
item.description: BAP confirms engagement. Consideration: ACTIVE with entitlementRef (no paymentAuthorisation — bifurcation rule). inputArtifacts: cough audio uploaded to artifactAccessEndpoint.

item.name: 06 — on_confirm  ★ Engagement Active
item.description: BPP confirms engagement is ACTIVE. artifactAccessEndpoint active for audio upload.

item.name: 07 — status
item.description: BAP polls for analysis result. message.contract includes id and commitments[] per StatusAction schema.

item.name: 08 — on_status  ★ Analysis Complete
item.description: AI analysis complete. HealthPerformance with clinicalInterpretation (confidence=0.91, flaggedFindings). HealthSettlement records drawdown. Contract: COMPLETE.

item.name: Scenario B — On-the-spot Payment
item.description: Individual patient pays Rs.250 via UPI at point of care. Full lifecycle from discover. FLW (Meena) uses seeker app to discover Swaasa, select single-engagement offer, and confirm after UPI payment. 10 steps.

item.name: 01 — discover
item.description: BAP broadcasts intent. schemaContext included (catalog phase). Filter: DIAGNOSTIC_ANALYTICS resources.

item.name: 02 — on_discover
item.description: BPP returns catalog. schemaContext included. Full resource + offer details. No consideration status (catalog phase).

item.name: 03 — select
item.description: BAP selects single-engagement offer. DRAFT contract. Minimal participants. No consideration in BAP select message.

item.name: 04 — on_select
item.description: BPP assigns contract.id. Consideration: PENDING (Rs.250, INDIVIDUAL). artifactAccessEndpoint returned.

item.name: 05 — init
item.description: BAP submits full participant details (PATIENT, FIELD_WORKER). Billing name in PATIENT.descriptor.name (billingDetails not valid in Contract). Consent captured. Consideration: PENDING (binding intent echoed).

item.name: 06 — on_init
item.description: BPP issues QUOTED consideration. selectedPaymentMethod=UPI. UPI VPA (swaasa@hdfcbank, Rs.250) communicated out-of-band via SMS/WhatsApp — paymentInstructions is not a valid Contract field.

item.name: 07 — confirm
item.description: BAP confirms after UPI payment. paymentAuthorisation with authCode={{payment_ref}}. Consideration: ACTIVE. inputArtifacts: audio.

item.name: 08 — on_confirm  ★ Engagement Active
item.description: BPP confirms engagement ACTIVE. artifactAccessEndpoint active.

item.name: 09 — status
item.description: BAP polls for result. message.contract includes commitments[].

item.name: 10 — on_status  ★ Analysis Complete
item.description: Analysis complete. HealthPerformance with clinicalInterpretation. HealthSettlement records UPI receipt. Contract: COMPLETE.

item.name: Scenario D — Entitlement Exhausted (Failure)
item.description: Seeker app attempts to draw down an exhausted entitlement. BPP returns CANCELLED contract at on_select. 2 steps.

item.name: 01 — select
item.description: Same as Scenario A select — BAP attempts drawdown.

item.name: 02 — on_select  (error — entitlement exhausted)
item.description: BPP returns CANCELLED contract. No entitlement capacity remaining.
